textByHash.4f3b580104c4fbe192e857ac8135c38b5fdac9a8: Vanstrom, I'd like you to meet Kroy.
textByHash.d5ee5c670ee5fd3675f90bdaa44aea1c899ec9e6: Well just hang on there, Vanstrom. Kroy may not look like much, but I've never met a vampyre with a better knowledge of herblore.
textByHash.56221bccd2ef7ecef4b1797b830d89960c45f8b5: Kroy, tell him what you found.
textByHash.18bb26f722725e49666ad048168dda38863e0f7f: Those who drink it find their lives heavily extended, but at a cost. They are put into a deep sleep, never to wake.
textByHash.d4a801d79a469178b6ec9a489746f7da07cc7c9a: Indeed. Using the recipe, Kroy was easily able to recreate the elixir. After a quick test on Lady Crombwick, we started giving it to the citizens.
textByHash.5c0fc411380c5476fb75ce3db503847188e9fcbd: And while they sleep, we tithe them. The sleepers only need a fraction of the blood a normal human needs, so we can take more than ever before!
textByHash.e2f3d5fccd7fd86bf5d8f4ed276649e5760bf0d0: The nobles of Darkmeyer make their demands Vanstrom. Someone has to meet them.
textByHash.8cf5a6209bba0b949dbd9e853d3cff0b13c5367e: The nobles are restless. They are tired of inaction. I saw an opportunity and I took it. Lord Drakan should thank me.
textByHash.848d88b2a03c8f0009a16a525a85ded023f2ee9a: The Myreque? Don't tell me you're scared of that lot, Vanstrom? I thought you were made of stronger stuff.
textByHash.d6342edf36d7d87f56aac53974398f41299a79ab: Well you'll have to do something. You'll need to send us some support.
textByHash.b4744f6b4b736f9f51290b9ec5fa2d844d1f65b3: Mind your tongue, dog, or I'll have you put in a collar.
textByHash.26148439f2ba4efc5fc789a337e17e33e1814c6d: Enough of this! What do you have for me?
textByHash.169f252ec668a79acdc2de0e2bb63da48295dc75: There's been a setback with our operations in Slepe. We need you to make up the shortfall. Next time, bring more.
textByHash.06d304b71eaf57dc839c6453e59e38d7c4f6cb93: I tire of your arrogance. We're done here.
textByHash.7995904aaaf8d595b20fa0749ad4a45d4cc0ba30: So here you are. I knew it was only a matter of time before you lot showed up.
textByHash.1304b4f5fb7ef2b00782846e328f303c7bdf7937: Listen to your arrogance! Is this what we've become? I remember when we commanded respect. Your kind would cower in fear at the sight of us!
textByHash.2996daf757188ff20eea79ce869722cc50b84ca8: You think I'm afraid? I am a lord of Darkmeyer. I am fear!
textByHash.acf11eebd2b6460fe1b8f9ba527b2efbe071f9ff: Cowards! That's what they are. I was their saviour! When our great leaders abandoned us, I was the one that kept them fed!
textByHash.8f236a9165ee5debc88676f41281a3b7247c1459: That is true for all of us!
textByHash.e70013630d5e6ff5522b13697fb2bb775e4edb73: Time to see what you're really made of!
textByHash.ba40561be82559a9f3fbdb792610dda69aeb9ed3: Come on then! This ends now!
textByHash.4cd9f5ee8796adcb5c4c0a05252ffedd9cace8a7: Is there something you wanted, bloodbag?
textByHash.b86d79fd9935e0401c9f58783c65fe73217ffd33: Well, I'd prefer you did it elsewhere, Crombwick is busy entertaining his guests.
